name: Schooltrans
districts_or_customers: Likely serves Memphis-Shelby County Schools area; NPI registration suggests Medicaid/NEMT or special-needs transport
recent_news: No recent M&A or news found. NPI registered May 2007. Operates from 3949 Whitebrook Plaza and 1725 E Holmes Rd in Memphis.
fit_notes: Very small Memphis-area operator (6 employees, ~$274K revenue). NPI bus registration suggests special-needs/NEMT capability which is attractive for Summit, but scale is sub-tuck-in. Owner/principals not identifiable online — would require direct outreach to qualify.

name: Kosti School Transportation
districts_or_customers: Listed in NJ DOE 2020-21 School Bus Contractor Codes as registered NJ school bus contractor (contractor code 4848, county code 13 = Morris County)
recent_news: No recent M&A or news. Appears in NJ DOE registered contractor list as 'Kosti Transportation' / 'Kosti School Transportation'.
fit_notes: Confirmed as a registered NJ school bus contractor but extremely small (3 employees, ~$263K revenue). Likely 1-3 bus owner-operator. Too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own; could only be relevant as a route-acquisition bolt-on within an existing NJ footprint.

name: Septran Inc
owner_or_parent: Summit School Services (formerly NELLC / National Express; I Squared Capital portfolio company)
principals: Roger Jensen (local manager — same name as deceased founder Roger Alan Jensen of Rosemount, MN)
districts_or_customers: Operations in MN (Bloomington, Burnsville) and IL (Yorkville, Wheeling, Winfield); specialized in special-needs student transport
recent_news: Acquired by Krapf Bus Companies in July 2011 from founder (age 83 at the time). Subsequently rolled into Summit School Services platform — listed as a Summit brand on nellc.com/summitllc.com. NOT an independent target; this is part of the Summit/Buyer platform.
fit_notes: EXCLUDE — Septran is part of the Summit School Services platform (the buyer). This Burnsville, MN address is a Septran terminal/satellite, not an independent operator. Do not pursue.

name: Devon-North Town Bus & Pro
districts_or_customers: Chicago/North Side area — 2nd floor office at 2540 W Devon Ave, West Ridge / Devon Avenue corridor; likely serves local private/parochial or CPS routes
recent_news: No public news, ownership records, or website identifiable. Name does not appear among Chicago's known school bus contractors (Alltown, Cook-Illinois, Latino Express, North America Central, A.M. Bus, etc.).
fit_notes: Micro-operator (5 employees, ~$258K revenue) at a 2nd-floor address on Devon — likely a 1-2 bus owner-operator or possibly defunct/under a DBA. No web presence found. Not an attractive tuck-in standalone; would need primary research to confirm it is even still operating.

name: Ready Bus Co Inc
owner_or_parent: Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Fund IV) via TIP Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC; rolled up under Minnesota Coaches family (Patrick O. Regan)
principals: Patrick O. Regan (Minnesota Coaches owner, controlling principal post-2014)
districts_or_customers: La Crescent, MN area schools; La Crosse, WI region; charter service throughout U.S. and Canada via Minnesota Coaches family
recent_news: Joe Ready founded 1952; Tom Ready sold to Minnesota Coaches' Pat Regan in 2014 (succession exit at age 60). In late 2024 Patrick Regan filed for after-the-fact STB authority for the consolidated Minnesota Coaches group. In January 2025, Tiger Infrastructure Partners Fund IV (via TIP Minnesota Coaches Acquisition LLC) filed to acquire control of seven motor carriers including Ready Bus Company — PE-backed roll-up now complete.
fit_notes: EXCLUDE as independent target — Ready Bus is part of the Minnesota Coaches family, which was acquired by Tiger Infrastructure Partners in early 2025. Tiger is a direct competitor PE platform building a Midwest student transport/motorcoach roll-up. Only relevant as a potential platform-vs-platform transaction, not a tuck-in.
